turns.input: Suno, seena bhari lag raha hai... left arm me halka numbness hai.
turns.label: Hinglish Emergency Signal

turns.input: Nahi, dird abhi start hua hai, but bahut zyada uneasy feel ho raha hai.
turns.label: Confirming Distress

turns.input: The ambulance support is also available if needed, right?
turns.label: Seeking Immediate Help

turns.input: Hello, kal cardiologist ka appointment book karna hai.
turns.label: Booking Intent

turns.input: 10 AM subah suit karega. Dr. Sen available hain?
turns.label: Time & Doctor Selection
